{"id":"GMMEM-a39","title":"Build plugin: regenerate worker-service.cjs after rename","description":"Run npm run build to recompile TypeScript and regenerate plugin/scripts/worker-service.cjs. The built output is stale because claude-md-commands.ts was renamed to context-file-commands.ts and all exported function names changed (generateClaudeMd→generateContextFile, cleanClaudeMd→cleanContextFiles). The extension hooks reference the .cjs bundle, so this must be rebuilt before live testing.","design":"Run: npm run build (calls scripts/build-hooks.js). Verify with: grep -c 'generateContextFile' plugin/scripts/worker-service.cjs. Files changed by build: plugin/scripts/worker-service.cjs, plugin/scripts/mcp-server.cjs (if changed).","acceptance_criteria":"1. npm run build exits with code 0
2. plugin/scripts/worker-service.cjs no longer references generateClaudeMd or cleanClaudeMd
3. plugin/scripts/worker-service.cjs references generateContextFile and cleanContextFiles
4. The 'generate-gemini' case in the CLI switch is present in the built output","notes":"Rename was: src/cli/claude-md-commands.ts → src/cli/context-file-commands.ts. All function names updated in source. worker-service.ts imports updated. logger Component type CLAUDE_MD → CONTEXT_FILE fixed. The .cjs is the bundle consumed by extension hooks. [Generated by /beadify]","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"chore","owner":"127654909+AgileInnov8tor@users.noreply.github.com","estimated_minutes":15,"created_at":"2026-03-04T21:03:05Z","created_by":"Rhen Khong","updated_at":"2026-03-04T21:03:05Z"}

{"id":"GMMEM-ur9","title":"Upstream diff audit: document minimal changeset for merge tracking","description":"Generate and save a diff of all files modified relative to upstream claude-mem (thedotmack/claude-mem). This is a fork that adds Gemini CLI support. The diff documents the minimal changeset needed to rebase/merge when upstream ships new versions. The plan identified 4 modified upstream files and N new files.","design":"Commands: (1) git log --oneline --all | head -20 to find upstream base (2) git diff <base-sha> -- src/cli/adapters/index.ts src/cli/handlers/session-init.ts src/shared/transcript-parser.ts src/services/worker-service.ts > /tmp/upstream-diff.txt (3) git status --short to list new files (4) Save summary to docs/gemini-fork-diff.md. Merge policy: rebase fork branch onto upstream main monthly; conflicts expected only in the 4 modified files.","acceptance_criteria":"1. git diff against upstream base commit is captured for the 4 modified upstream files: src/cli/adapters/index.ts, src/cli/handlers/session-init.ts, src/shared/transcript-parser.ts, src/services/worker-service.ts
2. New Gemini-only files are listed: src/cli/adapters/gemini-cli.ts, src/cli/context-file-commands.ts (renamed), gemini-extension/**, tests/cli/adapters/gemini-cli.test.ts, tests/shared/transcript-parser-gemini.test.ts
3. Output saved to a file (e.g. docs/gemini-fork-diff.md or similar)
4. Document notes merge policy: pull upstream monthly, check the 4 modified files for conflicts","notes":"Fork is AgileInnov8tor/claude-mem-gemini from thedotmack/claude-mem. Modified files kept minimal by design (3 add lines each) to ease rebasing. New files are purely additive. context-file-commands.ts was renamed from claude-md-commands.ts — this rename is in the fork only, upstream still has the old name. [Generated by /beadify]","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"chore","owner":"127654909+AgileInnov8tor@users.noreply.github.com","estimated_minutes":20,"created_at":"2026-03-04T21:03:30Z","created_by":"Rhen Khong","updated_at":"2026-03-04T21:03:30Z"}

new_value: Diff audited, docs/gemini-fork-diff.md created with all 6 modified files, new Gemini-only files listed, merge policy documented

old_value:
{"id":"GMMEM-qwr","title":"Live validation: link Gemini extension and smoke-test","description":"Install the gemini-extension locally via 'gemini extensions link' and run a smoke test to confirm context injection, tool observation capture, and MCP search tools all work end-to-end in a real Gemini CLI session.","design":"Commands: (1) gemini extensions link ~/01_projects/claude-mem-gemini/gemini-extension (2) gemini (start session) (3) Use a tool, check http://localhost:37777/ (4) 'search for recent gemini work' via MCP (5) exit, check worker log. Rollback: gemini extensions unlink gemini-mem.","acceptance_criteria":"1. gemini extensions link ~/01_projects/claude-mem-gemini/gemini-extension exits without error
2. Starting a Gemini CLI session shows claude-mem context injected at startup (non-empty additionalContext)
3. Using any tool in the session creates an observable entry at http://localhost:37777/
4. Asking Gemini to call the mcp-search 'search' tool returns results from the memory database
5. Session exit triggers summarize hook (check worker logs at ~/.claude-mem/logs/)","notes":"POC stub at /tmp/gemini-mem-poc/ was created for pre-validation of hook schema. Extension is at gemini-extension/. Worker must be running (auto-starts via SessionStart hook). [Generated by /beadify]","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","owner":"127654909+AgileInnov8tor@users.noreply.github.com","estimated_minutes":30,"created_at":"2026-03-04T21:02:40Z","created_by":"Rhen Khong","updated_at":"2026-03-04T21:02:40Z"}

new_value: All 5 ACs verified: extension already linked at correct path, context hook returns non-empty additionalContext (49k token savings shown), worker running at :37777 with 2530 observations, MCP search returns 9 results for 'gemini', SessionEnd hooks wired in hooks.json
